chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2557 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge For hearing of bail application 09.12.2024. Mr. Muhammad Suleman, advocate for applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali, advocate for complainant. Mr. Saleem Akhtar Buriro, Addl. P.G. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Khalid Zulqarnain is seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.508/2024 U/s 489-F PPC of P.S. Sukhan, Karachi. Applicant is present on interim pre arrest bail granted to him vide order dated 05.11.2024 and matter is fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2. Learned counsel for applicant at the very outset has submitted that applicant is ready to compromise with complainant and return his amount of cheque within one month. This proposal has been accepted by the counsel for complainant and learned Addl. P.G. 3. Accordingly, in view of above, this application is allowed and the ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions with consent. However, in addition to above, applicant shall pay amount of cheque viz. Rs.500,000/- to the complainant as undertaken by him, within one month before the trial court. In case of his failure to pay the amount, this application shall be deemed to have been dismissed and the trial court would be competent to take action against the applicant including his arrest. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of with consent. J U D G E A.K
